# Autogenerated/Modified for Multi-Model Benchmark

iree_add_all_subdirs()

# --- 1. Define Base Flags (Common) ---
set(BASE_RISCV_FLAGS
  "--iree-hal-target-device=local"
  "--iree-hal-local-target-device-backends=llvm-cpu"
  "--iree-llvmcpu-target-triple=riscv64-unknown-elf"
  "--iree-llvmcpu-target-cpu-features=+m,+a,+f,+d,+c,+v,+zvl128b"
  "--iree-llvmcpu-target-abi=lp64d"
  "--iree-llvmcpu-target-vector-width-in-bytes=16"
  "--iree-llvmcpu-debug-symbols=false"
  "--iree-vm-bytecode-module-strip-source-map=true"
  "--iree-vm-emit-polyglot-zip=false"
  "--iree-opt-level=O3"
  "--iree-llvmcpu-link-ukernel-bitcode=true"
)

# --- 2. Define Specific Flag Sets ---

# FLAGS FOR UKERNEL=ALL (Enable Data Tiling)
# Microkernels are designed for data tiling (mmt4d), so we keep it enabled here.
set(FLAGS_UK_ALL
  ${BASE_RISCV_FLAGS}
  "--iree-opt-data-tiling"
  "--iree-dispatch-creation-data-tiling"
  "--iree-llvmcpu-enable-ukernels=all"
)

# FLAGS FOR UKERNEL=NONE (Disable Data Tiling)
# We DISABLE data tiling here to prevent the compiler from generating 
# heavy stack-allocating packing code that crashes bare metal.
set(FLAGS_UK_NONE
  ${BASE_RISCV_FLAGS}
  "--iree-llvmcpu-enable-ukernels=none"
)

# --- 3. Generate Modules ---

# Size 64
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_64_uk_all
  SRC "mm_64.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_64_uk_all"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_ALL}
  PUBLIC
)
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_64_uk_none
  SRC "mm_64.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_64_uk_none"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_NONE}
  PUBLIC
)

# Size 128
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_128_uk_all
  SRC "mm_128.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_128_uk_all"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_ALL}
  PUBLIC
)
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_128_uk_none
  SRC "mm_128.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_128_uk_none"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_NONE}
  PUBLIC
)

# Size 256
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_256_uk_all
  SRC "mm_256.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_256_uk_all"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_ALL}
  PUBLIC
)
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_256_uk_none
  SRC "mm_256.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_256_uk_none"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_NONE}
  PUBLIC
)

# Size 512
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_512_uk_all
  SRC "mm_512.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_512_uk_all"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_ALL}
  PUBLIC
)
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_512_uk_none
  SRC "mm_512.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_512_uk_none"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_NONE}
  PUBLIC
)

# Size 1024
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_1024_uk_all
  SRC "mm_1024.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_1024_uk_all"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_ALL}
  PUBLIC
)
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_1024_uk_none
  SRC "mm_1024.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_1024_uk_none"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_NONE}
  PUBLIC
)

# Size 2048
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_2048_uk_all
  SRC "mm_2048.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_2048_uk_all"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_ALL}
  PUBLIC
)
iree_bytecode_module(
  NAME mm_2048_uk_none
  SRC "mm_2048.mlir"
  C_IDENTIFIER "iree_samples_mm_2048_uk_none"
  FLAGS ${FLAGS_UK_NONE}
  PUBLIC
)

# --- 4. Main Binary ---
iree_cc_binary(
  NAME
    benchmark_suite
  SRCS
    "device_embedded_sync.c"
    "simple_embedding.c"
  DEPS
    ::mm_64_uk_all_c
    ::mm_64_uk_none_c
    ::mm_128_uk_all_c
    ::mm_128_uk_none_c
    ::mm_256_uk_all_c
    ::mm_256_uk_none_c
    ::mm_512_uk_all_c
    ::mm_512_uk_none_c
    ::mm_1024_uk_all_c
    ::mm_1024_uk_none_c
    ::mm_2048_uk_all_c
    ::mm_2048_uk_none_c
    iree::base
    iree::hal
    iree::hal::drivers::local_sync::sync_driver
    iree::hal::local
    iree::hal::local::loaders::embedded_elf_loader
    iree::modules::hal
    iree::vm
    iree::vm::bytecode::module
)

iree_native_test(
  NAME "benchmark_suite_test"
  SRC ::benchmark_suite
)
